item.title: THM: Stickershop CTF
item.description: Platform: TryHackMe Link: Stickershop Level: Easy To read the flag in this very simple room, we must take advantage of a Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability. Scanning Using nmap to scan the target: nmap -sV -sC Target_IP -OG The_Sticker_Shop Results Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2025-03-30 19:58 GMT Nmap scan report for 10.10.97.238 Host is up (0.17s latency). Not shown: 998 closed tcp ports (reset) PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.

item.title: Whoami
item.description: ❓Introduction Hii, I’m Kwesi Larry,Web Application Security Researcher and Bug Bounty Hunter with experience in scripting, networking and linux administration. I Love solving CTF challenges, breaking things (ethically), and sharing my knowledge..I’m currently exploring most security frameworks like The OWASP Top 10, MITRE ATT&CK Framework and SANS Top 25. I mostly use my leisure to do OSINT Investigations and Forensics Investigations. 💡 Skills Penetration Testing: OWASP Top 10, Web Application Testing,Wireless Network Testing.
